---
title: "Creating a plan"
format: html
---


# Planning for Risky Situations

Use this worksheet before entering a risky environment to reduce risk and increase control.

---

## 1. Event Details

- **Event:**  
- **Date & Time:**  
- **Location:**  
- **Who will be there:**  

---

## 2. Risk Level

- How risky does this feel (0–10)? **_____**

Why?

>  

---

## 3. Identified Triggers

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Certain people  
- [ ] Specific emotions  
- [ ] Time of day  
- [ ] Alcohol availability  
- [ ] Social pressure  
- [ ] Other: _____________  

---

## 4. Intention for the Event

My goal is:

- [ ] Stay sober  
- [ ] Limit time  
- [ ] Practice coping skills  
- [ ] Other: _____________  

---

## 5. Coping Strategies Plan

What will you do if urges arise?

- 1. __________________________________  
- 2. __________________________________  
- 3. __________________________________  

---

## 6. Drink Plan

- What will you drink instead?  
>  

- How will you decline alcohol?  
>  

---

## 7. Support System

- Who can you contact if needed?  
>  

- Will someone attend with you?  
- [ ] Yes  
- [ ] No  

---

## 8. Time Limit

- Planned arrival: __________  
- Planned departure: __________  

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/timer.png?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

---

## 9. Early Warning Signs

What will signal it’s time to leave?

- [ ] Increased cravings  
- [ ] Stress or anxiety  
- [ ] Social pressure  
- [ ] Fatigue  
- [ ] Other: _____________  

---

## 10. Commitment

I commit to prioritizing my recovery by:

>  

---
